description_long: This is a large, four-door pickup truck with a deep maroon body and a black cargo bed cover. The vehicle features a robust front grille with chrome accents, prominent side mirrors, and large, rugged wheels suitable for urban and off-road environments. The windows are tinted black, and the truck bed is covered, suggesting utility and security for transported goods. Chrome trim is visible along the lower body and around the wheel wells, enhancing its upscale appearance. The rear of the truck includes a visible tow hitch and a tailgate with a manufacturer's badge. The overall design is modern, sturdy, and built for both passenger comfort and heavy-duty hauling.
description: A maroon four-door pickup truck with a black covered cargo bed, chrome accents, and large rugged wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing four doors, chrome trim, and the full length of the maroon body with a black cargo bed cover.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black cargo bed cover, tailgate with badge, and visible tow hitch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing four doors, chrome trim, and the black cargo bed cover.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the bold grille, chrome accents, and large side mirrors.
